# Todoist: To Do List & Calendar · Productivity

Generated: Jul 20, 2026, 9:54 PM

## **Contents** {#toc}

- [Pricing and paywall](#theme-pricing_paywall)
- [Sync and accounts](#theme-sync_accounts)
- [Notifications and reminders](#theme-notifications_reminders)
- [Feature requests](#theme-feature_requests)


## **Pricing and paywall** {#theme-pricing_paywall}

   **Pricing and paywall.**
      2 recent review(s) mention pricing and paywall.
      Review window: Jul 16, 2026 - Jul 16, 2026
      **Why it matters:** Users mention price, subscriptions, or paywalls. This can signal pricing sensitivity in the niche.

         **Review examples:**
            1. _Adam_, Jul 16, 2026, 1/5: "Displays a banner on top advertising premium account that is always present on the display. Quite annoying. Will be migrating to another app."

## **Sync and accounts** {#theme-sync_accounts}

   **Sync and accounts.**
      2 recent review(s) mention sync and accounts.
      Review window: Jul 17, 2026 - Jul 17, 2026
      **Why it matters:** Users mention sync, backup, login, or accounts. This points to trust and cross-device workflow expectations.

         **Review examples:**
            1. _Yavuz Yurtbeğendi_, Jul 17, 2026, 1/5: "I used it for a while, I was not thinking of writing such a bad review. I tried to delete my account after finding out this is not what I need. Deleting my account was so hard. I had to set up a password (signed up with google) because it did not allow me to delete, go to another page, come back, login again, go to delete page again and write email and password again was such a bad experience. They really tried to make deleting account as hard as possible."

## **Notifications and reminders** {#theme-notifications_reminders}

   **Notifications and reminders.**
      4 recent review(s) mention notifications and reminders.
      Review window: Jul 2, 2026 - Jul 18, 2026
      **Why it matters:** Users mention reminders or notifications. In productivity niches, this often points to retention mechanics.

         **Review examples:**
            1. _Diogo Nunes_, Jul 18, 2026, 4/5: "Down from 5, due to annoying toaster alerts"
            2. _Lucie Vox_, Jul 2, 2026, 4/5: "I've used the free version for years, and occasionally upgrade to the paid version for a few months. The ability to adjust reminder times on the paid version is useful. My only issue is I like to use the Todoist widget on my homescreen, and oftentimes it doesn't update to show the correct date unless I open the widget."

## **Feature requests** {#theme-feature_requests}

   **Feature requests.**
      2 recent review(s) mention feature requests.
      Review window: Jul 19, 2026 - Jul 19, 2026
      **Why it matters:** Users are asking for missing capabilities. This can reveal roadmap opportunities.

         **Review examples:**
            1. _Priyabrata Das_, Jul 19, 2026, 4/5: "There a snackbar whenever I reorder my task list. I find that a bit distracting can you please add an option to turn that off. The snackbar when task is completed is very useful because I sometimes accidentally click complete. I want to keep that and turn off the reorder snackbar."
